custom_conventions.unit_system: SI with eV for temperature and energy, cm^-3 for number densities
custom_conventions.temperature_unit: eV (electron-volt), T_e_eV; Kelvin used as T_K when explicitly noted
custom_conventions.density_unit: cm^-3 for number densities (n_e, n_i), g/cm^3 for mass density
custom_conventions.boltzmann_distribution: n_k/n_total = g_k * exp(-E_k / kT) / U(T) where U(T) is partition function
custom_conventions.line_profile: Voigt = Gaussian(Doppler) convolved Lorentzian(Stark+natural); sigma for Gaussian, gamma (HWHM) for Lorentzian
custom_conventions.ionization_potential_depression: Debye-Huckel model: delta_chi = e^2 * sqrt(4*pi*n_e / kT) in CGS
custom_conventions.partition_function: U(T) = sum_k g_k * exp(-E_k/kT), truncated at ionization potential
custom_conventions.closure_equation: sum(C_s) = 1 normalization of mass fractions; oxide mode available for geological samples
